TEXT.source: http://www.dspace.cam.ac.uk/handle/1810/241564. Whitehorn Paiwan collection, record 10 side a of tape: Christian songs to Aboriginal melodies, sung in the Amis language. The song titles are: 1) He Rose; 2) He Died For Me. He Opened the Way. The Lord's People; 3) The Crown of Thorns; 4) Tell the Nations; 5) Following the Lord; 6) Praise the Trinity. Recorded in 1950s.
TEXT.citation: Whitehorn, J. (n.d.). Whitehorn: Paiwan collection. Retrieved February 24, 2025, from https://www.repository.cam.ac.uk/collections/1240188b-2f4c-401e-9372-58177440d9c6 and https://www.repository.cam.ac.uk/collections/dc1f2cd8-36da-48e1-979b-fe478eff6a91
